headline: A Look At T. Rowe Price (TROW) Valuation After New Alternatives Push And Leadership Additions
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) has drawn fresh investor attention after appointing Bill Cashel as Head of Alternatives for U.S. Wealth and launching the OHA Flexible Credit Income Fund, expanding its presence in alternative and private markets. See our latest analysis for T. Rowe Price Group. Despite fresh headlines around alternatives and retirement leadership, momentum in T. Rowe Price Group's shares has been subdued, with a 90 day share price return of an 11.96% decline and a 5 year total...

headline: Smead Capital Management Appoints Brian Briggs as Chief Compliance Officer
summary: PHOENIX, April 01, 2026--Smead Capital Management, a Phoenix-based investment management firm and a leader in value investing, has appointed Brian Briggs as the firm’s Chief Compliance Officer.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on T. Rowe Price Group, Lowers Price Target to $107
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $115 to $107.
